{ "name": "phpunit/php-invoker", "description": "Invoke callables with a timeout", "type": "library", "keywords": [ "process" ], "homepage": "https://github.com/sebastianbergmann/php-invoker/", "license": "BSD-3-Clause", "authors": [ { "name": "Sebastian Bergmann", "email": "sebastian@phpunit.de", "role": "lead" } ], "support": { "issues": "https://github.com/sebastianbergmann/php-invoker/issues", "security": "https://github.com/sebastianbergmann/php-invoker/security/policy" }, "prefer-stable": true, "config": { "platform": { "php": "8.3.0" }, "optimize-autoloader": true, "sort-packages": true }, "require": { "php": ">=8.3" }, "require-dev": { "ext-pcntl": "*", "phpunit/phpunit": "^12.0" }, "autoload": { "classmap": [ "src/" ] }, "autoload-dev": { "classmap": [ "tests/_fixture/" ] }, "suggest": { "ext-pcntl": "*" }, "extra": { "branch-alias": { "dev-main": "6.0-dev" } } }
